title: Run Julia Script
summary: Run a Julia script with no extra arguments.

title: Run Julia Script with Arguments
summary: Run a Julia script passing positional args and named --key value pairs.
oce_text:
[["julia-wrapper::run_script"]]
script = "./simulate.jl"
args = ["config.toml"]

["julia-wrapper::run_script".kwargs]
iterations = "1000"
verbose = "true"

output_dir = "./outputs/jl-run"
trust_acknowledged = true

title: Run Julia Script with Project Environment
summary: Run a Julia script activating a local Project.toml so package imports resolve from the project's manifest.
